title: Call-In From 3GL
text: Call-In From 3GL Call-in from 3GL is the Uniface terminology for executing Uniface components from 3GL code, which could be either a stand-alone 3GL program, or a 3GL function that is called from Uniface with activate . You can call-in from 3GL using the functions from the Uniface Call-in API. Using this method, you can instantiate forms, services, and reports, and call operations in these instances, using return values and input/output parameters. The collection of available call-in functions is commonly referred to as the Call-in API. This method was introduced in Uniface V7 and makes full use of the capabilities of the activate statement. For more information, see Call-In Using the Call-In API . Related Links Call-In Non-Uniface environments can call in to Uniface components. All communication is passed to the Uniface components, making it possible to create and delete instances of the Uniface components, invoke their operations, and pass data to and from the components.
